name: cstack
description: Chinmay's personal Claude Code stack — skills and tools for everyday engineering work

plugins.name: dev
plugins.description: Engineering productivity skills — currently hosts a collaborative PR-review skill; future skills (doc generation, commit formatting, etc.) will live here too.

plugins.name: meta-cognition
plugins.description: Skills for deliberate reasoning frameworks — first-principles decomposition, assumption-examining, and related meta-cognitive approaches.

plugins.name: aira
plugins.description: Drive Capillary aiRA (configuration creation, loyalty analytics, QA) as a sub-agent from the CLI. Delegates Capillary-specific work — promotions, campaigns, audiences, journeys, milestones, customer/transaction analytics — to the deployed aiRA backend over a daemon-held WebSocket.
